authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 219577, "Bodfish Creek", Stream, CA, Santa Clara Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":219577,"gaz_name":"Bodfish Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Santa Clara","objectid_1":1035612,"isunknowncoords":2}, mouth point (Web Mercator -13539877.7201, 4440959.0045 → 37.01329°N, 121.63079°W). Corrects prior file coordinates (-121.6672, 37.0041), which coincidentally match the USGS stream-gauge site (station 11154100, Bodfish Creek near Gilroy) rather than the GNIS mouth location — the gauge sits roughly 3.4 km downstream/southeast of the creek's actual GNIS point. The corrected point is corroborated by HomeTownLocator's GNIS-derived coordinate for Bodfish Creek (Santa Clara Co.), 37.0132822°N, 121.630778°W.

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40(b)(19) — Bodfish Creek and tributaries (Santa Clara Co.)
sources.quotedText: (19) Bodfish Creek and tributaries (Santa Clara Co.). Closed to all fishing all year.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (CDFW booklet)
USGS Monitoring Location 11154100 — Bodfish Creek near Gilroy, CA
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.note: Bodfish Creek and all its tributaries in Santa Clara County are closed to all fishing all year.

regulations.humanSummary: Bodfish Creek and its tributaries are closed to all fishing year-round
regulations.verbatimText: Bodfish Creek and tributaries (Santa Clara Co.). Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license. This water is closed to all fishing all year, so the license requirement is moot here, but is included for statewide-standard completeness.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
